Fashion emerges as the best-fit brand category with an audience fit score of 50.0, outperforming all other categories including Sport and Finance (both 47.5), Tech (42.0), and Beverages (39.77), making it the most commercially viable activation space. A social-first channel strategy is recommended given the reggaeton genre's native alignment with short-form video and social platforms, which maximise reach across his top territories of MX and CO.
